meta.name: ScopeSight Design System
meta.description: A minimalist, document-centric PRD generator application.

appShell.className: h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden text-stone-800 font-sans selection:bg-peach-200 selection:text-stone-900 bg-[#FBFBF9]

header.className: h-20 px-8 flex items-center justify-between bg-stone-50 border-b border-stone-200/50 z-20 drag-region

sidebar.className: w-[420px] flex flex-col border-r border-stone-200/60 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm relative z-10 shadow-[4px_0_24px_-12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

mainCanvas.className: flex-1 bg-stone-100/50 relative flex flex-col items-center justify-start overflow-y-auto p-8 lg:p-12

container.className: w-full max-w-[800px] bg-white shadow-soft rounded-lg min-h-[1000px] p-16 relative border border-stone-100

marginLine.className: absolute left-6 top-0 bottom-0 w-px border-l border-dashed border-stone-200

primary.className: px-6 py-1.5 bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-full text-sm font-medium shadow-lg shadow-stone-900/10 hover:bg-stone-800 transition-all active:scale-95

secondary.className: px-6 py-1.5 bg-white border border-stone-200 shadow-sm rounded-full text-sm font-medium text-stone-900 transition-all hover:bg-stone-50 active:scale-95

navItem.base: px-6 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all rounded-full active:scale-95

icon.className: w-10 h-10 rounded-full border border-stone-200 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-stone-100 transition-colors text-stone-600 active:scale-95

selector.base: w-full text-left px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium border transition-all flex justify-between items-center group active:scale-[0.98]
selector.selected: bg-gradient-to-r from-sage-100 to-white border-sage-200 text-sage-800 shadow-sm

chatArea.container: relative bg-peach-50 border border-peach-200 rounded-xl p-4 transition-all focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-peach-200 focus-within:bg-white
chatArea.textarea: w-full bg-transparent border-none p-0 text-stone-700 placeholder-peach-500/40 font-serif text-lg focus:ring-0 resize-none outline-none

ghost.className: w-full bg-transparent border-none p-0 text-sm text-stone-600 placeholder-stone-400 font-mono leading-relaxed focus:ring-0 resize-none outline-none

indicator.container: hidden lg:flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-stone-400 px-3 py-1 bg-stone-100 rounded-lg border border-stone-200

logo.icon: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-stone-800 to-stone-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-serif italic font-bold

keyframes.modalIn: opacity-0 translate-y-[10px] scale-95 -> opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100
